page_metadata.biotools__summary: This repository contains a software mvBIMBAM, a version of BIMBAM for multivariate association analysis, implementing a Bayesian approach for genetic association analysis of multiple related phenotypes.  We adapted source codes in BIMBAM to deal with multiple related phenotypes.

We adapted source codes in BIMBAM to deal with multiple related phenotypes.
